step_rationale: Platelet dysregulation in ACS; upregulated in atherothrombotic disease; CAD-associated target.
mechanism: TAGLN2 dysregulation in ACS platelets reflects aberrant cytoskeletal remodeling in atherothrombotic activation.

references.title: Proteomic insights into the associations between obesity, lifestyle factors, and coronary artery disease.
Variations in Blood Platelet Proteome and Transcriptome Revealed Altered Expression of Transgelin-2 in Acute Coronary Syndrome Patients.
